form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 3rd in a small field at Turffontein Standside on March 21 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Utsaah carrying 60kg at $6.50. Before that 2nd of 8 at this track on February 26 over 1450m, 1.75 len behind Palace Script with 60kg at $17. Rates highly. Big chance to break through.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last in a small field at Turffontein Standside on March 21 over 1600m, 6 len behind Utsaah carrying 60kg at $5. The race before that 2nd in a small field at Vaal on February 5 over 1600m, 0.9 len behind Winter Wedding carrying 60kg at $2.40. On her best form she can take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 600m, involved in a tightening incident with Matter Of Trust.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 9th of 16 at Turffontein Standside on December 7 over 1160m, 14 len behind Play With The Wind with 60kg at $34. Returned from break 8th of 11 at this track on March 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Trip Of Faith with 60kg at $26. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 3rd of 8 at Turffontein Standside on February 14 over 1160m, 3 len behind Traditional Belief carrying 60kg at $9. Second-up 6th of 12 at Vaal on March 5 over 1600m, slow going 7 len behind Southampton carrying 60kg at $6. Doesn't look good enough to threaten.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At big odds at debut, 3rd in a small field at Vaal on February 24 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Star Blaze carrying 60kg at $34. Last start 4th of 11 at this track on March 19 over 1200m, 5 len behind Trip Of Faith with 60kg at $4.50. Close to a win. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 5th of 9 at Turffontein Standside on March 7 over 1160m, 4 len behind Detailed Forecast with 60kg at $13.50.
